description: Cropped screenshot of a news article header. On a plain white background, a small red rounded tag reads 'DEPORTATION' at top center. Below it is a large bold black sans-serif headline: 'ICE says it deported 174 criminal migrants from Texas, including a man with 39 illegal entries,' followed by a gray sub-headline: 'ICE says the 174 accounted for 610 criminal convictions, including 4 convictions for rape or sexual assault.' There is no photograph, logo, or agency seal visible in the crop; it is the text block of an online news story.
notable_text: DEPORTATION; ICE says it deported 174 criminal migrants from Texas, including a man with 39 illegal entries; ICE says the 174 accounted for 610 criminal convictions, including 4 convictions for rape or sexual assault
